title: Event
description: Single event affecting the democracy index. Stored in data/events/YYYY-Wxx.json (array of these objects).

date.description: ISO 8601 date the event occurred (not the date it was processed).

summary.description: 1–3 sentences, paraphrase only. No verbatim quotes longer than 15 words.

headline_en.description: Optional English translation of the headline. Pipeline writes Czech only by default; translate-events backfills these later.

summary_en.description: Optional English translation of the summary.

rationale_en.description: Optional English translation of the rationale.

severity.description: 1–5 per methodology/severity_rubric.md, or null when reviewer flag is required.

duration.description: one_off events decay linearly over 12 weeks. persistent events stay until status is set to resolved.

score_impact.description: Signed magnitude applied to pillar subscore. Derived deterministically from severity * direction per the rubric.

rationale.description: Why this severity and pillar. Must reference a specific criterion in methodology/severity_rubric.md.

reviewer.description: auto = classified by Claude only; manual = human approved before merge.

expires_at.description: Optional. For one_off events, the timestamp at which aged impact reaches zero.
